title: VAST Challenge2026
text:
ISSS608 · Visual Analytics & Applications · Group 5
    VAST Challenge2026
    Uncovering hidden patterns through interactive visual analytics — built with R Shiny.
    
      R Shiny
      Quarto
      Visual Analytics
    
  




  

    
      The Challenge
      
        As part of VAST Challenge 2026,
        our team is addressing Mini-Challenge 1 — using visual analytics to comb through TenantThread's internal communications to establish whether they made a deliberate decision to leak the merger information or the system simply broke down under pressure.
        Our goal is to build an interactive Shiny application that democratises data and empowers
        analysts to explore, interrogate and communicate findings visually.
      
      
        The project emphasises interactivity, integrating techniques from
        data analytics and visualisation to surface insights that static reports cannot.
      
      Read our proposal →
